title: Copper Is Useful Now
description: Copper Is Useful Now is a Minecraft mod that introduces copper-based items. Craft copper swords, pickaxes, axes, hoes, and armor. Experience the benefits of copper in your Minecraft world
body:
**Copper Is Useful Now** is a Minecraft mod that introduces a variety of copper-based items. It adds a copper sword, pickaxe, axe, and hoe, each with unique properties. Notably, the copper hoe is designed to be 1.1x faster and have 1.2x the durability of a stone hoe. The mod also includes a full set of copper armor, providing a new level of protection for players.

If you’re looking for a way to make more use of copper in your Minecraft world, this mod is for you. The copper tools and armor add a gameplay-aspect to your gameplay, offering more variety and options in your crafting and combat experiences. The enhanced durability and speed of the copper hoe, in particular, can significantly improve your farming efficiency.
